Washer Bottle and Washer Fluid R&I
is the vehicle caked in bondo
was the vehicle properly calibrated? Were all the ADAS calibrated as recommended by the OEM?
was it installed correctly? Is it aligned? Is it peeling? Is it straight?
is it the correct hardware or mix / match random and wrong
is the vehicle measurements in spec
is the paint the correct millimeter? Is it the same throughout?
were procedures researched, applied, documented, and followed?
is the vehicle covered in overspray or was car covered properly?
is the vehicle covered in compound?
Was vehicle scanned? Did it leave with codes cleared and no DTC's
Look for foam, cavity wax, burn marks, etc
was the part/vehicle properly welded? Was it welded in correct location? Are there burn marks? Were
was it aligned and in spec?
were wheels torqued to correct amount?
